text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking down the hall, I hear Grass
Wonder's voice coming from the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the medicine. I will take my leave
now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, I'm fine. Just a little headache, it's no big—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Dear me. It seems this medicine might take
a while to kick in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder seems to be having trouble with
headaches. It may be a good idea to take it easy
on her for a little while.
